subcodes.first_line: All praise be to Thee, O my God, for having made me the recipient of Thy trials and the target of Thy decrees, and for all that hath descended upon me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فلک الحمد یا الهی علی ما جعلتنی موارد بلائک و مواقع قضائک و وردت علی ما
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for tests and difficulties
